plan.content:
I have created a work plan to research and outline a pentest methodology for WiFi networks. The plan includes the following actionable steps:

1. Research the reconnaissance phase in WiFi pentesting, including tools and techniques used.
2. Investigate the scanning phase for WiFi networks, focusing on tools and methods for identifying vulnerabilities.
3. Explore the exploitation phase in WiFi pentesting, detailing common attacks and exploitation techniques.
4. Examine the reporting phase, outlining how to document findings and create a comprehensive report.
5. Compile all findings into a structured outline of the pentest methodology for WiFi networks.

This plan will guide the research and analysis process effectively.
